title: Repurposed Structures - Bygone Nether Compat
description: A partially buried Jungle Fortress to explore with towers above!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Bygone Nether mod. The original RS Jungle Fortress will be disabled and a Bygone Nether styled Jungle Fortress will be added instead. It will be basically a Stonebrick variant of Bygone Nether's Nether Fortress. This datapack will work with other RS Compatibility datapacks that also affect the Jungle Fortress. Each new Fortress style is a new structure.


- Bygone Nether mod can be obtained from here: 

  - Forge: https://modrinth.com/mod/bygone-nether

  - Fabric: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bygone-nether-fabric

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here:

  - Forge: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

  - Fabric: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8Xv7wkWd/images/db5ccb2575062119ab03c86e3362080df29985f6.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8Xv7wkWd/images/db5ccb2575062119ab03c86e3362080df29985f6.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Packs to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
